lines.lyrics: Lag ja gale ke phir yeh haseen raat ho na ho
lines.indian: Re— Ga~Ga Re Ga— | Ga Re~Re Ga Re Ga— Sa— Sa Ga~Re—

lines.lyrics: Paas aaiye ke hum nahin aayenge baar baar
lines.indian: Sa— Pa Ma~Pa Pa Ma Dha Pa ma— | Sa ma~ma Dha Pa ma Pa~ma Ga—

lines.lyrics: Baahen gale mein daal ke hum ro lein zaar zaar
lines.indian: Sa— Pa Ma Pa Ma Sa'— Dha~ma ma— | Sa ma~ma Dha Pa ma Pa~ma Ga—

lines.lyrics: Aankhon se phir yeh pyaar ki barsaat ho na ho
lines.indian: pa— pa Ga~Re Ga— | Ga Re~Re Ga Re Ga— Sa— Sa Ga~Re—

lines.lyrics: Lag ja gale ke phir yeh haseen raat ho na ho
lines.indian: Re— Ga~Ga Re Ga— | Ga Re~Re Ga Re Ga— Sa— Sa Ga~Re—

lines.lyrics: Shayad phir iss janam mein mulaqaat ho na ho
